themes.label: Creation
themes.summary: This chapter underscores creation, the heavens and earth, or God’s creative ordering work. Local Strong’s word study and cross references data reinforce this reading across 5 verses. Commentary leans on "Jerome on Commentary on Ezekiel: (Chapter 35) And the word of the Lord came to me, saying: So...". Word-study detail reinforces "הָאָ֔רֶץ: When the whole earth - the earth (at large, or partitively a land)".
